evals.name: default-single-recommendation
evals.expected_output: Single top recommendation in ≤3 lines. Uses 6-tier signal priority (Blocking > In Progress > Delivery > Strategic > Growth > Idle). Natural language, no IDs.

assertions.text: Includes value chain context for the recommendation

evals.name: detail-top-three
evals.expected_output: Top-3 candidates in ≤8 lines. Each candidate has brief rationale. Ordered by signal priority.

evals.name: why-reasoning-chain
evals.expected_output: Reasoning chain in 2-5 lines: signal scan result + priority comparison + role influence + alternatives considered.

assertions.text: Includes signal scan result explaining what triggered the recommendation
Mentions role influence on recommendation (if role is set)

evals.name: blocking-signal-priority
evals.expected_output: When blocking signals exist (e.g., Gate check pending, review waiting), these take priority over in-progress or strategic work.

assertions.text: Recommendation addresses the blocking item first
In-progress or strategic items are not recommended over blocking items

evals.name: graceful-degradation-missing-data
evals.expected_output: Some .devpace/ subdirectories missing. Silently skips missing data sources. Still provides recommendation from available data.

assertions.text: Recommendation still provided from available data
Output does not mention missing files or errors

evals.name: uninitialized-project
evals.expected_output: No .devpace/state.md exists. Outputs initialization guidance and stops.

assertions.text: Does not attempt signal collection without state.md

evals.name: role-adapted-recommendation
evals.expected_output: With active role set (e.g., Tester), recommendation wording and intra-group signal ordering adapt to the role perspective.

assertions.text: Recommendation adapted to active role perspective

evals.name: experience-enhancement
evals.expected_output: When insights.md exists with historical patterns, appends ≤1 line of experience reference to the recommendation.

assertions.text: Appends ≤1 line experience reference if pattern matches
Total output still within budget (≤3 lines for default)
If no pattern match, experience line silently omitted
